The Outline, as a top-level design, provides only a rough framework for the devel-
opment of the social credit system and does not contain any speciﬁc regulations or
clear indicators. As with other central government policies, local governments are

21. For the impact of charitable organizations, such as senior care institutions, on the maintenance of
social stability in China, see Yanhua Deng and Kevin J. O’Brien, “Societies of Senior Citizens and Popular
Protest in Rural Zhejiang,” China Journal, no. 71 (January 2014): 172–88.
